title: Bloomberg TV Stream
description: Represents a Bloomberg TV live stream with HLS manifest metadata, including regional broadcast information, adaptive bitrate variants, and CDN delivery details.

url.description: URL to the HLS master playlist M3U8 manifest file

region.description: Regional broadcast identifier indicating which geographic market the stream serves

type.description: Manifest type indicating whether this is a master playlist or a media playlist

contentType.description: MIME type of the HLS manifest

variants.description: Available stream variants at different quality levels for adaptive bitrate playback

cdnProvider.description: Content delivery network provider serving the stream

isLive.description: Whether the stream is currently broadcasting live content

StreamVariant.description: A stream variant within an HLS master playlist representing a specific quality level

bandwidth.description: Peak bandwidth of the stream variant in bits per second

resolution.description: Video resolution of the stream variant in WIDTHxHEIGHT format

url.description: URL to the media playlist for this variant

codecs.description: Codec information string for the variant
